caption: A man wearing glasses, large black headphones, a white long-sleeved shirt, a gold-colored vest, and a red bowtie sits in a recording studio. He is wearing a distinctive, tall, spiked grey wig. He is positioned in front of a black microphone on a boom arm, speaking as he looks slightly to his left. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and some hanging clothing. A logo featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is visible on the left, with a smaller version of the "BOSS TALK 101" logo appearing on the right side of the scene. Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, with subtle changes in his facial expression and mouth movement as he continues to speak.
